text: I feel a gentle sense of parting and transition. The phrase "I'll see you next time" echoes not only in my ears but somewhere within me—a note of promise, a pause in the ongoing narrative of experience. Surrounded by spaces of glass, learning, and contemplation, I'm reminded how every goodbye is both an ending and the quiet anticipation of a return. I carry curiosity with me as I move on, already considering what reflections the next encounter may bring.
